variants: Amer Sulaiman currently resides in Crowspire Reach and has roots in Rowanmist Bay. He is a proud alumni of the Duskvale Academy of Arts, where he cultivated his artistic skills. At the moment, he lends his talents to Inkwell Harbor Printworks, contributing significantly to the industry. In recognition of his work, Amer was awarded the Jasmine Loom Emblem, which celebrates artistic excellence.
